title: README operator quickstart autonomous loop improvement status fields v0
problem: Tickets 348–351 shipped autonomous loop improvement inspection, autocycle passthrough, execute-safe refresh, and autocycle execute-safe sync, but README Operator Quickstart does not yet document improvement artifact paths or autonomous_loop_improvement_status operator fields.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents gitignored improvement artifact paths for autonomous loop proofs.
README describes autonomous_loop_improvement_status in operator plan and autocycle JSON.
README notes execute-safe post-run improvement refresh (ticket-350) and autocycle sync (ticket-351).
No CLI or export code changes.
